notes: v0.12.7 — canonical currency icons. PULSE is now P1 HEX COIN (cyan hexagonal coin with white lightning bolt inside) and SURGE is now S3 SPARKLE STAR (gold 4-point star with inner white highlight). These are the only icons used across the whole UI — replaced bolt outlines in top-bar Command Deck currency module, wallet/shop chip glyph, daily-quest reward chip, and profile hero PULSE pill. Consistent palette and lighting on every screen. Windows only.
